title: FLOSS Weekly 495: HAX
summary:
Bryan Ollendyke is the lead of the HAX the web, web component authoring system as well as lead of the ELMS: Learning Network project. He's been a 100% effort FOSS developer for over 10 years at Penn State, meaning every line he's written the last 10 years has been an open contribution!
Nikki Massaro Kauffman is a user experience and front end developer on HAX and ELMS:LN. She has been a web developer and accessibility expert for the last decade. She started life as a school teacher in public education before jumping tracks to building systems to better serve education.
Download or subscribe to this show at https://twit.tv/shows/floss-weekly
Here's what's coming up for FLOSS in the future.
Think your open source project should be on FLOSS Weekly? Email Randal at merlyn@stonehenge.com
Thanks to Lullabot's Jeff Robbins, web designer and musician, for our theme music.
